study_title: Metatranscriptome analysis of sympatric bee species identifies variants of bee infecting viruses, and a novel RNA virus primarily associated with Andrena
design: Total RNA from 11 individual bees was rRNA depleted (Ribozero) > RNA pooled > library constructed using TruSeq Stranded mRNAseq sample prep (no polyA selection) (barcoded to distinguish from other samples in same lane) > 2 x 100 nt Illumina HiSeq 4000 sequencing.
lab: Department of Plant Sciences and Plant Pathology
